## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat:` New feature
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor:` Code refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `perf:` Performance improvement
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation update
- [ ] `test:` Test addition or fix
- [ ] `chore:` Build/CI/dependency changes
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing API)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (`mvn spotless:check`)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass (`mvn clean verify`)
- [ ] SPI changes are backward-compatible (existing implementations still compile)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed

## Related Issues

Closes #
